_doc: the scaffold store's rhythm — every job disabled; nothing arms itself.

ntfy._doc: push reach (spec/experience.md: notify-only — the item and a deep link, never the decision). server AND topic are null by default: unconfigured means every push is skipped with an honest log line, never sent to a silent third-party default. point server at an ntfy instance you chose and pick a private topic. link_base is where deep links point — set it to the tailscale hostname when the phone needs reach.
